import argparse, os, json, numpy as np
p=argparse.ArgumentParser()
p.add_argument('--data_path',required=True)
p.add_argument('--checkpoint',required=True)
p.add_argument('--output',required=True)
args=p.parse_args()

ckpt_dir=os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint) if os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint) else 'checkpoints'
mean=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'mean.npy'))
std=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'std.npy'))
W=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'ridge_perch_tv.npy'))  # [C, 96, 720]

X=np.load(os.path.join(args.data_path,'test_windows.npy')).astype(np.float32)
N=X.shape[0]
Xn=(X-mean)/std
last=Xn[:,-1:,:]
Xc=Xn-last  # [N,96,7]
P=np.zeros((N,720,7),dtype=np.float32)
for c in range(7):
    P[:,:,c]=Xc[:,:,c].astype(np.float64)@W[c]
P=P+last  # add back last value
P=P*std+mean  # denormalize
out={'predictions':P.tolist()}
with open(args.output,'w') as f:
    json.dump(out,f)
print('wrote',args.output)
